_note: Self-contained STATIC SNAPSHOT copied from the CGL Workstation eval golds (src/cgl/eval/golds/match.jsonl). This is NOT a live connection to CGL -- the data was copied so this Oraculum example is a standalone, reproducible project with zero dependency on CGL. The candidates it references live in candidates.json (also a snapshot). See recall_oracle.py / recall_runner.py for how this feeds the Verdict Engine.
_symptom_framing: Verdict Engine judges whether a SYMPTOM reproduces. Here the symptom is 'a known-good (golden) candidate FALLS OUT of the recall top-k'. hit == golden candidate NOT in top-k. Re-running recall N times gives the attempt series the engine aggregates.

cases.description: 自动驾驶感知(BEV+Transformer)量产负责人;对口=理想/图森感知负责人
cases.source: CGL match.jsonl :: must_surface=[李泽明,王晨], must_rank_top=3
